currency.description: currency Code apply to all elements of the price

sellingTotal.description: sellingTotal = Total + margins + markup + totalFees - discounts

items.title: Markup
items.description: Markup applied to provide a service or a product to the client. The markup can be introduced by any stakeholder. Typical use case is to convey markup information set by the travel agent or in case of merchant mode.

amount.description: Defines the monetary value with decimal position as a String.
